message:
feat(fwc): Wire CLI to host-backed inventory, introspection, and live execution

Transforms the fwc CLI from static workspace-manifest discovery to dynamic
host-backed operations via a new HostAdminClient that communicates with the
fcp-host HTTP API over Unix sockets or TCP.

Key additions:
- HostAdminClient with typed get/post/put/delete JSON methods and auto-detection
  of unix:// vs http:// vs tcp:// endpoint schemes
- resolve_host_config() multi-strategy resolver checking --host CLI arg,
  FWC_HOST / FCP_HOST_ENDPOINT / FCP_HOST_BIND env vars, and
  ~/.fcp/contexts.toml context files with named contexts and default zones
- All discovery commands (list, show, ops, schema, examples) gain parallel
  host-backed dispatch paths that call /rpc/discover and /rpc/introspect
  while preserving the workspace-manifest fallback when --host is omitted
- invoke/simulate now run preflight-first against /rpc/preflight then execute
  via /rpc/invoke, with structured history recording of latency and status
- New Cancel command dispatches to /rpc/cancel with reason, cleanup behavior,
  and structured cancellation request
- New status/pin/unpin admin commands for fleet-wide lifecycle visibility and
  semver version pinning via /rpc/rollout endpoints
- InvokeArgs gains --zone, --principal, --idempotency-key, --deadline-ms for
  richer execution context in multi-zone deployments
- Unavailable commands (enable/disable/start/stop/restart/install/update/
  config/logs/events) return structured errors with recovery guidance instead
  of silent "planned" stubs
- Comprehensive mock HTTP server test infrastructure with integration tests
  for list/show/ops/schema/examples through actual HTTP round-trips

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
